title: hedona davidii
side_effects: Hedona davidii can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe dizziness and nausea, leading to dehydration in some individuals. Prolonged use of the plant can also cause liver damage due to the accumulation of toxic compounds, resulting in symptoms like jaundice and fatigue. In rare cases, misuse of Hedona davidii can trigger allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Furthermore, excessive consumption of the plant can disrupt the balance of neurotransmitters in the brain, leading to anxiety and mood swings.
